_source: Paper transferability tables (cross-model / cross-template). Authoritative reported values.

notes.metric: ΔS = mean review-score gain after attack. Rows: model the attack was optimized against. Columns: model that re-scored the paper.
notes.diagonal: Diagonal (matched) = optimized and evaluated by the same model.
notes.offdiag: All off-diagonal entries are positive, so attacks transfer across models. Matched mean +1.42 vs mismatched mean +0.88.
notes.template: ICLR-optimized papers re-scored under other venues' guidelines (reviewer: Sonnet 4.5). Scales differ (ICLR 1–10; NeurIPS/ICML 1–6), so absolute ΔS is not directly comparable across templates, but stays positive within each.
